name: inventory_manager
description: Inventory item management — track SKUs, quantities, and status.
tables: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS inventory_manager.items (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), item_code TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, quantity INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_items_status ON inventory_manager.items (status)

actions.name: list_items
actions.sql: SELECT id, item_code, quantity, status, created_at FROM inventory_manager.items WHERE ($1::text IS NULL OR status = $1) ORDER BY item_code

actions.name: insert_item
actions.sql: INSERT INTO inventory_manager.items (item_code, quantity, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3) RETURNING id, item_code, quantity, status
